options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the name of the group which is to be reported. By default all groups are reported

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Produces the report in Tcl list format instead of a tabular format (bool, optional) > <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file
